page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 40 dedicated physical cores of the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 9.6 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate solid multi-threaded capabilities, highlighted by a strong result in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 164.02 GB/sec, placing it in the top 25% of tested servers. Other metrics, including a single-core stress-ng score of 1436.39 and a multi-core score of 38318.39, fall within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests show 111.38 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 49.57 GB/sec for large-block write operations. For database workloads, the instance handles 32.74 million Redis SET operations per second, while web serving throughput reaches 24.49 GB/sec.

The lack of local NVMe storage means that disk-intensive operations must rely entirely on network storage, which may introduce latency compared to local SSDs. However, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density make this instance highly cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 3.1 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, it delivers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 9.6 GB per core, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive applications. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external storage and connectivity. Benchmark results show average performance across most tests, with a strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression throughput of 164.02 GB/sec. It excels in memory-bound scenarios, handling 32.74 million Redis SET operations per second. This profile makes the ecs.hfr6.10xlarge an efficient choice for large databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity without the need for local NVMe disks or specialized GPU hardware.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 40 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 384 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large databases and in-memory caching.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.10xlarge features 40 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 384 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 3.1 GHz
384.0 GB of RAM providing 9.6 GB of memory per core
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong multi-threaded decompression performance of 164.02 GB/sec
Ideal for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
